# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# Global level configuration
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - http://example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Content-Type
  - name: key-auth
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      policy: local
      second: 5

# Service level configuration
services:
  - name: example-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://example-service.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Content-Type
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          policy: local
          second: 3

# Route level configuration
routes:
  - name: example-route
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://example-route.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Content-Type
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          policy: local
          second: 2
